prompt: Design a symbolic collage using a burning flame from image 1, ocean waves from image 2, and cloud forms from image 3.
prompt_refined: Generate a symbolic collage artwork. Feature the burning flame from image 1 positioned centrally, ascending from a dynamic expanse of ocean waves derived from image 2, which should occupy the lower and mid-ground. Integrate the cloud forms from image 3 across the upper portion of the composition, forming the sky backdrop for a visually impactful and cohesive artwork.
objects: dynamic expanse of ocean waves in the lower and mid-ground
cloud forms in the upper portion, forming the sky backdrop
